sections.paragraph:
διαγογγύζω impf. διεγόγγυζον; fut. 3 sg. διαγογγύσει Sir 31:24; 1 aor. 3 pl. διεγόγγυσαν LXX (s. γογγύζω; Heliod. 7, 27, 4; LXX; TestJob 14:4) complain, grumble (aloud) w. λέγων foll. Lk 15:2; 19:7.—TW

impf. impf. = imperfect

fut. fut. = fut.

  1. sg. = singular

aor. aor. = aorist

  1. pl. = plural

LXX LXX = Septuaginta, ed. ARahlfs, unless otherwise specified—Lists 2, beg.

Heliod Heliod , III? a.d.—List 5

TestJob TestJob = Testament of Job—List 2

foll. foll. = followed, following

TW TW = Theologisches Wörterbuch zum NT; tr. GBromiley, Theological Dictionary of the NT—List 6

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 227
